title: Official Information Act 1982 - NZ Legislation
description: New Zealand legislation establishing mandatory procedures for public access to official information, personal information rights, and withholding criteria. Establishes frameworks for information requests, ombudsman review, and transparency obligations for government agencies and public organizations.
